text.name: store_searchDialog_info
text.text:
Create a search assignment for our broker. You can choose one of three options:
 1. Normal search (<1 month, ~65% chance)
 2. Extended search (<3 months, ~80% chance)
 3. Continous search (a year, ~98% chance)

A longer assignment increases the search area and the chance of success, but at a higher cost.

text.name: search_completed_success_info
text.text: Congratulations! The broker found matching equipment, check the sales tab in the store.

text.name: search_completed_failed_info
text.text: Unfortunately, the broker could not find any matching equipment within this time frame and search area.

text.name: search_started_info
text.text: Keep an eye out for a notification from the broker...

text.name: search_started_confirmation
text.text: The used equipment broker has got your assignment. A upfront fee of %s have beed deducted from your account. Keep an eye out for a notification from the broker when the search assignment has ended.
